discover.title: Auto-discover Device Info
discover.description: Turn off power to the range hood, wait 10 seconds, then power it on again. Keep this page open. After the local cloud captures the device info, submit this step and the form will be prefilled with the device identifier and serial number.

manual.title: Configure Fotile Range Hood
manual.description: Confirm the device info and MQTT settings, then submit to create the config entry.

data.mqtt_host: MQTT Broker LAN IP (defaults to HA host IP)

error.discovery_not_ready: Device info has not been captured yet. Power-cycle the range hood, then submit again.
error.cannot_start_discovery: Unable to start the local cloud. Check whether the port is already in use.
error.discovery_timeout: No range hood was discovered. Check DNS and DNAT, then start auto-discovery again.

abort.cannot_start_discovery: Unable to start the local cloud. Check whether the port is already in use.
abort.discovery_timeout: No range hood was discovered. Check DNS hijacking and power-cycle the range hood.
